'''Goroth Prime''',<ref name="FACPOV">{{StoryCite|story=Tooth and Claw|book=From a Certain Point of View: The Empire Strikes Back}}</ref> also known as '''Goroth''',<ref name="Rebel Files">''[[Star Wars: The Rebel Files]]''</ref> was a terrestrial astronomical object<ref name="Rise" /> in the [[Goroth system]] in the [[Trans-Nebular sector]] of the [[Mid Rim Territories]], in grid square R-16 of the [[Standard Galactic Grid]].<ref name="Appendix" /> It was a rich source of [[hyperbaride]], a mineral that lay beneath Goroth Prime's crust. In [[10 BBY]], the [[Galactic Empire]] had outsourced the mining on hyperbaride to various subsidiary organizations, and many native [[Gorothite]]s were also used for forced labor. Due to the highly radioactive nature of the mineral, many of the natives became horribly exposed with the damage to them and the planet as a whole being disastrous.<ref name="Rise" />

When [[Agent]] [[Alecia Beck]] of the [[Imperial Security Bureau]] requested a meeting with [[Senator]] [[Mon Mothma]], Mothma's [[aide]], [[Hendri Underholt]], lied to Beck and told her that Mothma had already left [[Coruscant]] and had gone on a fact-finding mission to Goroth.<ref name="Rebel Files">''[[Star Wars: The Rebel Files]]''</ref> The [[Trandoshan]] [[bounty hunter]] [[Bossk'wassak'Cradossk]] once joined a [[Rodian]] posse on Goroth Prime.<ref name="FACPOV" />
